title: Babies, children and young people’s experiences of domestic abuse
body: "This report considers the current response to children and young people who experience domestic abuse at home or in their family, including:   prevention opportunities to identify and intervene early the crisis response ongoing support    There is an error in section 7.5.2 of the PDFs with regards to the homelessness legislation. For the updated version, use the accessible version or visit the Domestic Abuse Commissioner website.  "
